description_long: This rifle features a classic design with a wooden fixed stock and foregrip, paired with a matte black metal receiver and barrel assembly. The magazine is a curved, detachable box type, positioned just ahead of the trigger guard. The barrel is long and slender, with a simple front post sight and a rear notch sight integrated into the receiver. The wood components have a smooth, polished finish, contrasting with the matte, slightly textured metal parts. The overall silhouette is streamlined, with no visible attachments or modern tactical accessories.
description: A classic rifle with a wooden fixed stock, black metal receiver, and a curved detachable magazine.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the rifle, including the wooden stock, curved magazine, and barrel with iron sights.
description_view_1: Front-on view highlighting the narrow profile of the barrel and the end of the wooden stock.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the magazine, trigger, and the smooth wooden stock with a visible buttplate.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the back of the wooden stock and the alignment of the barrel and receiver.
